texto: Whenever one person in a relationship is unwilling or unable to contact his or her vulnerability in the interaction, there is a simultaneous movement into judgement: self-attack, attack of the other, or both. This is a chicken-or-the-egg situation: Do you resort to judgment for protection because you don't feel safe, or are you not feeling safe because of the presence of judgment? This is a fundamental question in dealing with the judge.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Byron Brown que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Whenever one person in a relationship is unwilling or unable to contact his or her vulnerability …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre saude-mental, inner-critic, self-awareness, com foco em self-awareness.
